scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run test:ci
scripts.precheck: npm -w web run extract && npm -w web run lingui
scripts.check: npm run check:format && npm run check:types && npm run check:lint
scripts.precheck:types: npm run build -w projects && npm run build -w runner && npm run build -w simulator && node_modules/.bin/tsc --build components
scripts.build: cross-env CI=true npm run build -w projects && cross-env CI=true npm run build -w runner && cross-env CI=true npm run build -w simulator && cross-env CI=true npm run build -w cli && node_modules/.bin/tsc --build components && npm run postbuild -w components && cross-env CI=true npm run build -w web
scripts.build:extension: cross-env CI=true npm run build -w extension
scripts.watch: concurrently -k --restart-tries 3 "npm run build -w components -- -w" "npm run build -w projects -- -w" "npm run build -w runner -- -w" "npm run build -w simulator -- -w"
scripts.test:ci: cross-env CI=true npm test -w simulator && cross-env CI=true npm test -w components && cross-env CI=true npm test -w web
scripts.playwright:install: npm exec -w e2e -- playwright install chromium
scripts.preinstall-cli: npm run build -w projects && npm run build -w runner && npm run build -w simulator && npm run build -w cli
